# CWE-521 positive: registration accepts one-character passwords (pure stdlib)
lang: go
file: CWE-521-vulnerable.pure.go
variant: pure-go
---
package sample

import (
	"database/sql"
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
)

type signupPayload struct {
	Email    string `json:"email"`
	Password string `json:"password"`
}

func RegisterAccount(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request, db *sql.DB) {
	var body signupPayload
	if err := json.NewDecoder(r.Body).Decode(&body); err != nil {
		http.Error(w, err.Error(), http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	if len(body.Password) < 1 {
		http.Error(w, "password required", http.StatusBadRequest)
		return
	}
	_, _ = db.Exec("INSERT INTO users(email, password_hash) VALUES (?, ?)", body.Email, body.Password)
	w.WriteHeader(http.StatusCreated)
}
